sun.title: Sun protection
sun.description: SPF 30 to 50+, light textures designed for the Dominican Republic's tropical climate.

repair.title: Repair & soothing
repair.description: Balms, serums and formulas targeted at sensitive, irritated or damaged skin.

brightness.title: Radiance & evenness
brightness.description: Anti-spot serums, vitamin C, niacinamide. For a more luminous, even tone.

expertise.title:
A pharmacy,
not a store.
expertise.p1: Every product in our catalogue is selected and tested by our pharmacists before reaching the shelf. We don't list what's pitched to us — we list what we recommend.
expertise.p2: For a dermatology consultation, book an appointment with our partner clinic Skin Laser Center, in the same building.
expertise.signature: — An initiative led by a collective of Dominican pharmacists.

morning.title: Cleanse & protect
morning.description: Gentle cleansing gel, vitamin C serum, SPF 50 sunscreen. The minimum ritual to start the day under the tropical sun.

evening.title: Remove & regenerate
evening.description: Micellar water, hyaluronic acid serum, night cream. The moment skin accepts the most potent actives.

weekly.title: Exfoliate & nourish
weekly.description: Clay mask or gentle exfoliant. A weekly gesture to kickstart cellular regeneration.

hero.title:
A pharmacy,
not a shop.
hero.sub: We are the first dermo-cosmetic pharmacy in Santiago. Every product in our catalogue is selected and tested by our pharmacists — for a dermatology consultation, we refer you to our partner clinic Skin Laser Center.
hero.cardBody: If we wouldn't recommend it to a relative, it isn't in this catalogue.

manifest.title:
We don't list what we're
offered — we list what we recommend.
manifest.sideNote: Our team receives no commissions from brands. We recommend based on evidence, not margin.
manifest.p1: Dominican skin lives under a particular sun, in particular humidity, with particular water. Generic internet recommendations don't know it.
manifest.p2: We do. Every product in the catalogue was evaluated by our pharmacists before reaching the shelf — and our selection criteria are public, further down on this page.
manifest.p3: For product or availability questions, write us. A real person responds on WhatsApp the same day. For a dermatology diagnosis, we refer you to our partner clinic Skin Laser Center.

team.title:
Behind the counter,
seven people trained in dermo-cosmetics.
team.lede: Each one with an area of expertise — from teen acne to photo-protection on mature skin. No AI, no chatbot.
team.leadCreds: UASD '08 · Dermo-cosmetic specialization CIDESCO Barcelona '12 · 14 years of clinical practice.
team.leadQuote: Pharmacy-grade dermo-cosmetics, explained by the people who practice it every day.
team.m2Quote: Before changing a product, we look at the whole routine.
team.m3Quote: Acne isn't punished, it's supported. Slow steps, steady results.

criteria.title:
Four filters
before reaching the shelf.
criteria.lede: Only 12% of the products we evaluate each year make it into the catalogue. Here are the criteria.
criteria.c1Body: Every reference has an active health registration number with DGM (D.R.) or equivalent CE/FDA in its country of origin. No exceptions, no grey-market products.
criteria.c2Body: We ask the lab for the in-vivo studies (not in-vitro) supporting the efficacy claims. If they don't exist — it doesn't enter.
criteria.c3Body: Three pharmacists test it for 28 days under our conditions (35°C, 80% humidity, high UV exposure). What works in Madrid doesn't always work here.
criteria.c4Body: Direct import with a documented chain from manufacturer to our pharmacy. Zero parallel distributor, zero grey-box stock.
criteria.cert3Desc: Associated network for dermo-pharma good practice.

visit.title:
We're in central
Santiago, in pharmacy.
visit.lede: A neighbourhood physical pharmacy. Drop by during our hours to pick up an order or ask a product question.

partner.title:
Skin Laser Center,
under the same roof.
partner.lede: Our partner dermatology clinic shares our building. When your skin needs a clinical consultation, we send you straight to our colleagues — two doors down, no phone coordination needed.
partner.p1: Skin Laser Center offers dermatology consultations, laser hair removal, and medical aesthetic procedures. Their team applies the same pharmacist-grade rigour as ours — and most of the routines we recommend here have been designed alongside them.
partner.p2: If you come to FARMAU with something that needs a medical consultation, we make the introduction. No paperwork, no new appointment: thirty seconds on foot and you're in.

review.title:
We just opened.
Your feedback counts double.
review.lede: FARMAU is a brand-new pharmacy. We don't have a track record of reviews yet — and we'd rather say so than invent them. If our advice helped you, please leave us a review on Google.
review.p1: Each review counts enormously in the first months: it helps neighbours in Cerros de Gurabo find us, and tells us what we do well — and what we can improve.
review.p2: If you'd rather tell us something privately, message us on WhatsApp. A real person responds the same day.
review.partnerNote: In the meantime, you can read reviews of Skin Laser Center, our partner clinic in the same building, with whom we work daily.

cta.title: Got a product question?
cta.body: Message us on WhatsApp, drop in, or call us for product questions and orders. For a dermatology diagnosis, book an appointment with our partner clinic Skin Laser Center, in the same building.

Delivery.title: Click & collect without pressure.
Delivery.subtitle: You reserve online, we check availability, you come pick up at the pharmacy. No remote payment, no shipping.

howItWorks.title: Three steps, no surprises.
howItWorks.step1Body: Browse the catalogue, add products, validate the reservation from the cart as a signed-in user.
howItWorks.step2Body: You receive a WhatsApp message from our team confirming availability and the proposed pickup slot.
howItWorks.step3Body: Show your reservation reference at the pharmacy, pay on the spot (cash, card) and leave with your products.

practical.title: Everything happens in Santiago.
practical.addressLine1: Calle Jesús de Galíndez, esq. Calle 3
practical.paymentNote: No online payment, everything is done at the pharmacy.

ttl.title: A reservation stays active for 24 hours.
ttl.body: After that time, without confirmation on our end, the reservation is automatically cancelled and products are made available again for other customers.
ttl.cancel: You can cancel at any time by replying to the WhatsApp message or writing to us — no fees, no need to justify.

cta.title: Ready to reserve?
cta.body: Over 350 certified dermocosmetic products, selected by our pharmacists.

Faq.title: Your questions, our answers.
Faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before reserving. If your question is not here, write to us.

q1.q: How do I reserve a product?
q1.a: Add the product to your cart, create an account if you don't have one, then click Reserve from the cart. You'll receive a reference in the format FAR-XXXXXXXX.

q2.q: How long is my reservation valid?
q2.a: 24 hours from creation. Beyond that, without confirmation from us, it automatically expires and products are released.

q3.q: Can I have several active reservations?
q3.a: Only one active reservation at a time. To reserve other products, wait until the first one is confirmed, collected or cancelled.

q4.q: How do I cancel a reservation?
q4.a: Reply to the confirmation WhatsApp message or write to contact@farmau.do. No fees, no reason needed.

q5.q: Is there a deposit to pay?
q5.a: No. The reservation is free and non-binding. Payment only happens at pickup in the pharmacy.

q1.a: Yes. We source exclusively from the authorized distributors of the brands (ISDIN, La Roche-Posay, Avène, Filorga, etc.) in the Dominican Republic.

q2.q: How do I know which product to choose?
q2.a: Filter the catalogue by need (acne, hydration, anti-ageing…) or by skin type. For a dermatology diagnosis, book an appointment with our partner clinic Skin Laser Center.

q3.q: Can prices change between reservation and pickup?
q3.a: Displayed prices are in Dominican pesos (DOP), tax included. They may be adjusted at pickup to reflect the in-store price on the day of the transaction.

q4.q: What if a product doesn't suit me after use?
q4.a: In line with practice for opened hygiene and skincare products, they cannot be returned. If in doubt about tolerance, book an appointment with our partner clinic before buying.

q1.q: Why is the phone number mandatory?
q1.a: Because all confirmation and follow-up happen on WhatsApp. Without a phone, it is impossible to finalize a reservation.

q2.q: How do I change my password?
q2.a: From your account → Security, or directly via the forgot password page. A secure link will be sent to your email.

q3.a: Yes, from Security → Delete my account. The request is handled within 30 days under Ley 172-13 DR.

q1.a: Calle Jesús de Galíndez, esq. Calle 3, Cerros de Gurabo, Santiago. See the pharmacy page for the map and directions.

q2.a: Monday to Friday: 9am – 7pm. Saturday: 9am – 2pm. Sunday closed.

q3.q: Can someone else collect my order?
q3.a: Yes. They just need to show the reservation reference and an ID. Payment is due at pickup.

q4.a: Not for now. FARMAU operates as click & collect only, to ensure the cold chain for sensitive products and in-pharmacy pickup.

q1.q: What do you do with my data?
q1.a: Full details in the privacy policy. In short: authentication, follow-up of your reservations, WhatsApp communication. No sale to third parties.

q2.a: No. Only strictly essential cookies (auth, cart, language) are set. See the cookie policy for details.

q3.q: Can I retrieve my personal data?
q3.a: Yes, under Ley 172-13 DR. Request at contact@farmau.do, reply within 30 days.

contact.title: Didn't find your answer?
contact.body: A pharmacist replies directly, within the day.

Pharmacie.title: One place, all the care.
Pharmacie.subtitle: The entire FARMAU selection is available for click & collect at our pharmacy in Cerros de Gurabo, Santiago.
Pharmacie.addressLine1: Calle Jesús de Galíndez, esq. Calle 3

access.title: How to come?
access.body: The Cerros de Gurabo area is served by the main avenues of Santiago. Free parking in front of the pharmacy. 15 minutes by car from downtown and from Cibao airport.

forWho.title: A 100% dermo pharmacy.
forWho.body: FARMAU is dedicated to pharmacist-grade dermo-cosmetic care: reactive skin, acne, anti-ageing, photoprotection. For a consultation, our partner clinic Skin Laser Center is in the same building.

Manifesto.title: The pharmacy, not retail.
Manifesto.lede: FARMAU is not a parapharmacy. It's a pharmacy that has chosen to cultivate dermocosmetic care with the rigor usually reserved for medication.
Manifesto.intro1: We started by removing. Removing complacent brands, artificial promotions, ten-product routines. What remains is what we would dare recommend to our own family.
Manifesto.intro2: Curating is daily work. Reading INCI line by line. Following published clinical studies. Exchanging with labs on new launches and, sometimes, refusing a reference because the indications seem unclear.
Manifesto.intro3: Advising means slowing down. Taking five minutes to understand your skin type before suggesting a product. Saying « what you need is already at home », even if it doesn't generate a sale.

pharmacist.title: Pharmacist first
pharmacist.body: Every reference in the catalogue has been validated by a pharmacist. No product is listed on the basis of a marketing pitch or a social-media trend.

curation.title: Curation over volume
curation.body: 353 products, not 3,000. Thirteen brands chosen for their scientific rigor. Refusing is part of the job.

human.title: Human contact
human.body: No chatbot, no automated reply. A pharmacist responds on WhatsApp, takes the time, orients. Click & collect is an excuse to meet.

care.title: Long-lasting care
care.body: A good routine lasts. We prefer an honest product page that says « unnecessary for you » to an easy sale. Your trust matters more than your next order.

quote.text: The best skincare is the one you understand. Not the most expensive one.

cta.title: Shall we take you to the pharmacy?
cta.body: Browse the selection, ask your questions on WhatsApp, come pick up. No pressure, no shipping.

init.qtyHelp: Physically count the units on the shelf.

init.priceHelp: Replaces the current price on the site.
init.activateHelp: Make the product visible on the site once initialized.
init.modeReception: Reception: stock {result}, cost recorded (margin from the 1st sale).
init.modeAdjust: Adjustment: stock set to {result}, no cost (margin at first restock).

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.intro: Discount campaigns (% or fixed amount) applied to targeted products. The discounted price shows on the storefront and is charged in the cart.
promotions.empty: No promotions yet. Click “New promotion” to create one.
promotions.deleteConfirm: Delete promotion “{name}”? Discounted prices will revert to normal.
promotions.errorInvalidTarget: A selected target no longer exists.
promotions.targetsEmpty: No targets. Add at least one product, brand, range or tag.
promotions.hint: The best price wins if a product is targeted by multiple promotions.

tags.title: Tags
tags.emptyState: No tag types. Click New tag type to create the first one.
tags.deleteTagConfirmBody: This tag will be removed from all associated products.
tags.deleteTypeConfirmBody: This type and all its tags will be deleted. Products will not be affected.

messages.title: Support tickets
messages.searchPlaceholder: Search by subject, email or content…
messages.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete this ticket?

annonce.title: Homepage
annonce.intro: Everything shown on the homepage: the order of the main sections and the promo banners.
annonce.bannersHint: Cards shown on the homepage, in the order below. The eye shows whether a banner is online. They only appear if the 'Promo banners' section is enabled above.
annonce.previewEmptyHint: No active banner — the home shows without a CMS banner.

deleteModal.title: Delete banner
deleteModal.body: You are about to delete this banner. Accumulated impressions will be lost.

customers.createHint: A setup link will be generated to send to the customer via WhatsApp (they choose their password and email).
customers.anonymousHint: No customer data. The sale is identified by its reference #FAR-…
customers.guestHint: Reservation without an account: the phone lets you notify the customer at pickup.

setup.title: Account created
setup.body: Send the customer their setup link: they will choose their password and email to access their account (history, reviews).
setup.waMessage: Here is the link to set up your FARMAU account (password + email): {link}

sales.title: Sales
sales.voidConfirm: Void this sale? Stock will be restored and the row will leave the journal.
sales.bulkVoidConfirm: Void {count} sales? Stock will be restored.

empty.title: No
empty.body: Counter sales and picked-up reservations will appear here.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.emptyBody: Try another status, date range, or clear the search.
reservations.errorActiveExists: This customer already has an active reservation.
reservations.whatsappIntro: We are contacting you about your reservation *#{ref}* at FARMAU.
reservations.whatsappCta: Shall we arrange payment and delivery?
reservations.cancelConfirm: Cancel this reservation? This action is irreversible.
reservations.bulkCancelConfirm: Cancel {count} reservations? This action is irreversible.

create.title: New reservation
create.emptyItems: No products yet. Search above to add.
create.notePlaceholder: E.g. Stock confirmed at the pharmacy. Customer prefers to pay cash.
create.soldHint: The customer leaves with the goods: recorded as sold and stock is decremented.
create.saleHint: The customer leaves with the goods: recorded as sold, stock is decremented right away.
create.reservationHint: Reservation to fulfil later: stock is only decremented at pickup.

time.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

bulk.selected: {count, plural, one {# reservation selected} other {# reservations selected}}

drawer.sectionProducts: Products · {count, plural, one {# product} other {# products}}
drawer.notePlaceholder: E.g. Stock confirmed at pharmacy. Customer prefers cash.
drawer.priceLocked: Price locked: the reservation is already recorded or closed

users.title: Customers
users.errorCannotDemoteSelf: You cannot remove your own admin rights.

tuto.title: Panel guide
tuto.searchStatus: {hits, plural, one {# match} other {# matches}} · {sections, plural, one {# section} other {# sections}}

admins.title: Administrators
admins.addHint: Search for a registered user to grant admin access.
admins.confirmPromoteSuper: Promote {who} to super admin? They'll be able to manage the admin team.
admins.readOnlyNotice: Only a super admin can manage the team.
admins.errorCannotModifySelf: You can't modify your own access.
admins.errorCannotModifySuper: Can't modify another super admin (do it in the database).

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.limitHint: Showing up to {limit} rows. Refine the filter to see more.

settings.title: Shop & reservations
settings.subtitle: The information shown on the public site: identity, contact, and the pickup point for reservations.
settings.identityHint: Name and tagline shown in the header, footer, and site metadata.
settings.taglineHint: Short line below the logo, default OG description.
settings.contactHint: Details shown on /contact, /pharmacie, and in the footer.
settings.whatsappHint: International format, no spaces (e.g. +18094122468). Used for reservation follow-up via wa.me links.
settings.reservationHint: Customers reserve online, you follow up on WhatsApp, they pick up at the pharmacy. Pickup is free.
settings.flowStep1Body: The customer reserves products from the catalogue.
settings.flowStep2Body: You follow up to confirm availability.
settings.flowStep3Body: They collect and pay for the order on site — free.
settings.holdNote: Reservations are held for 24h, then expire automatically.
settings.pickupHint: Shown in the reservation flow, on /pharmacie, and in the confirmation.
settings.inventoryHint: Stock management rules applied across the panel (Stock page, dashboard, badges).
settings.lowStockThresholdHint: At or below this number of units, a product is flagged as “low stock” (minimum 2). Out of stock remains 0.
settings.staffHint: Discount reserved for staff, applied manually during a counter sale.
settings.employeeDiscountHint: From 0 to 100. At 0, no discount. Shown to the whole admin team; applied at the counter in one click.

setup.title: Admin system configuration
setup.actionTitle: Action required: Configure the service key
setup.step1li1: Log in to your Supabase dashboard
setup.step2Title: Step 2: Add the key to the project
setup.step2Body: Create or edit the .env.local file at the project root:
setup.step3Body: After adding the key, stop the server (Ctrl+C) and restart:
setup.successBody: All environment variables are correctly configured.
setup.resourceTip: Tip: Never share your service key!

blog.title: Blog
blog.empty: No articles yet. Create your first blog post.

appearance.title: Site theme
appearance.subtitle: Choose the color palette applied to the public site. The hummingbird adapts automatically to the chosen theme.
appearance.publicNote: the public site updates on next load

Error.body: An unexpected error occurred. Try again or go back to the homepage.

Blog.heading: Blog
Blog.subtitle: Advice, news and dermo-cosmetic updates
Blog.empty: No articles yet. Check back soon!

Help.title: How can we help you?
Help.subtitle: Find a quick answer, or report a problem — bug, error or question. Our team gets back to you as soon as possible.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.desc: Answers to the most common questions about products, reservations and pickup.

delivery.title: Pickup & click-and-collect
delivery.desc: How to reserve online and pick up your products at the pharmacy.

reservations.title: My reservations
reservations.desc: Track the status of your reservations from your account.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.desc: Contact details, opening hours and the general contact form.

whatsapp.heading: WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: The fastest way for a question about a reservation.

form.heading: Report a problem
form.intro: Describe your problem (bug, error, question). No account needed — just leave an email so we can reply.
form.emailHint: So we can reply. No account required.
form.subjectPlaceholder: Sum up the problem in a few words
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe what happened and, if possible, the steps to reproduce it…
form.success: Thank you! Your report was sent. We'll get back to you soon.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
